race.comment: CASINO SHAW (3) dropped back to 1100m last start and missed in a photo finish, racing on a Heavy deck at Nowra. She remains at 1100m today, but the visors replace the blinkers and she maps for a lovely run up front. Jumped favourite in a tougher race two back and looks poised to go one better here. NEEDAWINNA (9) bumped into a good winner at Albury last start, narrowing the margin late in the race. Out to 1100m looks a good move and she should get a very similar run in transit today. Wouldn't surprise to see her go one better. GEM TYCOON (2) has switched to the Freedman stable in the break and has been readied with 3 trials for his return. Collett was on board for his latest heat and she sticks with him today. Can make his presence felt. JUKEBOX FLYER (11) is racing well in easier events and can't be discounted. TENNESSEE DOLLY (8) can make an impression dropping to this grade.
